title: 2019-2020 Akademik Yılı Yurt Dışından Öğrenci Seçme Sınavı İlanı
content:
tıklayınız

.

The names of the candidate students, whose applications for İstanbul 29 Mayıs University International Student Quotas have been accepted and are invited for “International Student Admission Examination” on July 25-26, 2019, are as given below.

Relying upon the possibility of obtaining final registration right for our university, the candidate students have to bring the “The Documents Required for Final Registration Process”, when they come to the exam.

The candidate students have to be present to attend “International Student Admission Examination” at İstanbul 29 Mayıs University at 09:00 a.m., on July 25, 2019.

Click

here

for complete list.
